strings.ios.aiParsing.hipaaComplianceBody: Me whai koe, tō tari rānei i te Business Associate Agreement (BAA) kua hainatia me Anthropic hei whakamahi i tēnei āhuatanga me ngā raraunga tūroro. Ko ngā kī API takitahi mai i console.anthropic.com kāore e kapi i te BAA i te taunoa.
strings.ios.aiParsing.howItWorksBody: Ka whakamahi tēnei āhuatanga i a Claude, te AI a Anthropic, hei wetewete i ngā whakaahua mata monitors me ngā rārangi rongoā mō te tangohanga raraunga tika ake i te tukatuka ā-pūrere. Ka tukuna ngā whakaahua ki te API a Anthropic mā te hononga HTTPS whakamuna, ka wetewetehia, ka whakakore wawetiahia e Anthropic. Mā ngā Tautuhinga Wātū e whakahaere mēnā ka tiakina he kape ā-rohe ki tō rārangi wātū.

Kāore ngā pūkete API paerewa e whakaurua te BAA. Whakapā atu ki te rōpū pakihi a Anthropic, ki tō āpiha whakaū rānei.

strings.ios.destinations.privacy.oneTimeDescript: Ka tono MedicLog i tō wāhi kotahi anake ina pātō koe i 'Kimi Tata'. Ehara tēnei i te aroturuki tonu.
strings.ios.destinations.privacy.yourControlDesc: Ka taea e koe te whakaweto i ngā āhuatanga wāhi i Tautuhinga. Me te kore whakaaetanga wāhi, ka taea tonu e koe te tirotiro me te kōwhiri ā-ringa i ngā ūnga.
strings.ios.destinations.privacyTitle: Me Pēhea te Mahi o 'Kimi Tata'
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.chooseMethodSubtitle: Me whai mātou i te tauira hei ako i tō hōputu.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.chooseMethodTitle: Me pēhea e whiwhi ai koe i ngā tau haere?
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.clipboardErrorMessage: Kāore he kupu i te papatopenga. Tāruatia he karere i te tuatahi, kātahi pātōhia Haere Tonu.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.doneMessage: Whakamātauria me tō karere tuku e haere mai ana.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.haveCopyButton: He kupu, īmēra rānei tāku hei tārua
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.introMessage:
Ka taea e MedicLog te kite aunoatia i ngā tau haere mai i ngā karere tuku.

E rua ngā ara:
• Tārua me whakapiri — tāruatia he karere tuku, whakatuwherahia MedicLog, ka whakakīia te tau haere
• Whakahaere Shortcuts — ka kitea wawetiahia ngā tau haere i te tuarā
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pasteFromOtherAppsLabe: Whakapiri mai i Ētahi Atu Taupānga
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pasteMessageInstructio:
Hurihia ki tō Messages, Īmēra, taupānga CAD rānei, tāruatia he karere whai tau haere.

Kātahi hoki mai ki konei, pātōhia Haere Tonu.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionExplana:
Ka pātai iOS "Whakaaetia te Whakapiri?" ia wā e pānui ai MedicLog i te karere tuku kua tāruatia.

Homaitia te whakaaetanga kotahi i Tautuhinga, kātahi kāore e pātaihia anō.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionWorkflo: Tārua tuku → whakatuwhera MedicLog → ka whakakīia aunoatia te tau haere, kāore he pāho.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.radioDispatchHint: Tuku reo irirangi, CAD, ētahi atu pūtake kore-kupu — whakamahia "patohia he tauira."
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.savedMessage:
Ka mōhio MedicLog ki ngā tau haere pēnei i %@ ina tārua koe i te karere tuku, ka whakatuwhera i te taupānga.

Mā te whakahaere Shortcuts, ka taea hoki te kite aunoatia i ngā karere tuku i te tuarā — kāore he tārua e hiahiatia ana.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsOfferMessage:
Ka taea e ngā Shortcuts iOS te kite aunoatia i ngā karere tuku, ka tuku i te tau haere ki MedicLog — kāore he tārua e hiahiatia ana.

Me tautuhi kotahi i te taupānga Shortcuts.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsOfferTitle: E Hiahia Ana ki te Kite Tere?
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsRequirementNo: Me whai iOS 16, nui ake rānei. Whakamātauria mā te tono i tētahi tangata ki te tuku karere e whai ana i tō hōputu tuku.

strings.ios.dispatchTagger.instructionsLabel:
Pātōhia ngā kupu hei kōwhiri, kātahi tohua he momo āpure.
Pātōhia ngā kupu tata hei whakawhānui kōwhiringa.
strings.ios.dispatchTemplates.emptyStateMessage: Hangaia he tauira mā te whakapiri i te karere tuku, ka tūtohu i ngā āpure e hiahia ana koe ki te tango.
strings.ios.dispatchTemplates.howTemplatesWorkBo: Ka ōrite ia tauira ki tētahi hōputu karere tuku motuhake. Ina tae mai he karere tuku, ka tirohia e MedicLog ia tauira hohe hei tango i te tau haere, waka, wāhitau, me ērā atu āpure.
Hangaia he tauira motuhake mō ia momo karere e whiwhi ana koe (hei tauira, tuku matua, whakahōu, āwhina tahi).

strings.ios.exportOptionsView.exportOptionsFoote: Ka whai pea ngā whakaahua i ngā mōhiohio tūroro taea te tautuhi, ngā whara, ngā taipitopito hauora rānei. Ka whakaaturia ngā tuhinga whakaahua hei wāhi pupuri ina whakawetotia.

strings.ios.exportOptionsView.phiWarningBody1: Ka whai pea ngā kōnae kaweake i ngā Mōhiohio Hauora Whakamaru (PHI) tae atu ki ngā taipitopito tūroro, hītori hauora, me ngā taipitopito maimoatanga.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.phiWarningBody2: Ko koe te kawenga mō te whakarite kia tukuna ngā kaweake mā te haumaru, ki ngā kaiwhiwhi whaimana anake e hāngai ana ki ngā ture HIPAA.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.photoWarningAlertM:
Ka whai pea ngā whakaahua i ngā Mōhiohio Hauora Whakamaru TINO TŪRARU tae atu ki ngā kanohi tūroro, ngā whara kitea, ngā taputapu hauora, me ngā pākete rongoā.

Ko koe te kawenga mō te whakarite kia tukuna ngā kaweake whakaahua mā te haumaru, ki ngā kaiwhiwhi whaimana anake e hāngai ana ki ngā ture HIPAA.
strings.ios.fastedScale.instructions: Kaute ia kitega 0-2. Tapeke ≥%lld e tohu ana i te Large Vessel Occlusion.

strings.ios.helpLibraryView.airDropDetail: Tiri rārangi waea ā-tōtika ki ngā pūrere Apple tata. He whakawhiti tōpū tere, haumaru.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.autoDetectionDetail: Ina whakapiri, pato rānei koe i te kupu tuku, ka tangohia aunoatia e MedicLog ngā tau haere me ngā mōhiohio tūroro.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.bedsideTransferDetai: Hangaia he waehere QR mā te ohu kaiwhiwhi hei matawai. Ka whakawhiti haumaru i ngā raraunga tūroro i roto i ngā hēkona.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.cardiacDetail: Uru tere ki te CPR, whakapāpakutanga, whakaritehurihanga. Pātō, kōrero reo rānei hei tuhi mahi manawa.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.copyReportDetail: Pātōhia Tārua hei whakarite i te pūrongo MIST ki tō papatopenga. Whakapiri ki ngā tuhipoka reo irirangi, ki te whakamōhio hōhipera rānei.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.countPulseRespDetail: Pātōhia Tatau Puku, Tatau Whakahā rānei i Tohu Ora. Ka āwhina te ataata ki te tatau mō te 15 hēkona, ka whakarea aunoatia.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.creatingTemplatesDet: Haere ki Tautuhinga > Tautuhinga Tuku. Tāpirihia ngā tauira e hāngai ana ki te hōputu SMS o tō pokapū tuku.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.dispatchAutoFillDeta: Tautuhia ngā tauira SMS i Tautuhinga hei whakakī-aunoatia i ngā tau haere me ngā mōhiohio tūroro mai i ngā kupu tuku.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.doubleTapActionsDeta: Pātō-rua i tētahi ataata hei uru ki ngā mahi tere: Tākaro-anō, Tāmoe 1min, Pupuri, Panaia rānei.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.editingProfilesDetai: Pātōhia te tohu pene i tētahi kōtaha hei whakatika ingoa, ID, tau waka, tari rānei.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.encryptedTransferDet: Kaweake hei kōnae .mlshare me te whakamuna kupu huna. AES-256 mō te hāngai ki HIPAA.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.ivioAccessDetail: Tuhi ngā ngongo IV me ngā ngira IO. Whakamahia te hoahoa tinana hei tohu i ngā wāhi whakaurunga.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.keyboardShortcutsDet: Me te papapātuhi o waho: Cmd+N mō te tuhinga hou, Cmd+T mō ngā ataata, Cmd+V mō ngā tohu ora.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.medicationsDetail: Pātōhia he pātene rongoā, whakamahia rānei te reo hei tuhi. Ka tīmata aunoatia ngā ataata rongoā ina whiritia.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.mistFormatDetail: Pūrongo hangaia-aunoatia: Tikanga/Amuamu hauora, Whara/Māuiui, Tohu/Tohumate, Maimoatanga kua hoatu.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.multiProviderModeDet: Tāpirihia ngā mema ohu ki te waea. Ka tohua ia tuhinga ki te kaitiaki i tuhi.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.notesDetail: Tāpirihia ngā tuhipoka kupu-noa. Hurihia te Amuamu Matua hei whakaāhua i te momo waea.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.offlineModeDetail: Ka mahi motuhake te Matau ina kore te iPhone i te awhi. Ka tukutahi ina hono-anō.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.pdfCsvExportDetail: Kaweake rārangi waea hei PDF mō ngā pūnaha ePCR, hei CSV rānei mō te wetewete ripanga.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.perProfileSettingsDe: Ka taea e ia kōtaha te whai pātene tuhinga tere, tae ataata, me ngā manakohanga rongoā rerekē.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.proceduresDetail: Tuhia ngā tikanga mahi pēnei i te intubation, splinting, tiaki whara, me ērā atu.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.qrCodesDetail: Hangaia ngā waehere QR mō ngā tuku tere. Matawai me tētahi pūrere MedicLog kē hei kawemai.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.qrSharingDetail: Ka matawai te pūrere kaiwhiwhi i tō waehere QR. Ka whakamuna ngā raraunga, kāore rawa e pā ki tētahi tūmau.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.redoseDetail: Ka tuhi i tētahi tākaro anō o te rongoā ōrite, ka tīmata-anō te ataata.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.runNumbersDetail: Tāurua ā-ringa, whakapiri rānei mai i te SMS tuku. Ka kite aunoatia MedicLog i ngā hōputu tau haere noa.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.sampleTemplatesDetai: Ka tautoko ngā tauira i ngā wāhi pupuri pēnei i {RUN}, {AGE}, {SEX}, {CHIEF}. Tirohia ngā tauira i Tautuhinga Tuku.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.shareReportDetail: Tirihia mā AirDrop, Messages, ētahi atu taupānga rānei. He pai mō te whakamōhio-tōmua hōhipera.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.snoozeDetail: Ka toronga te ataata mō te 1 meneti me te kore tuhi tākaro. He pai ina noho pai te tūroro.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.startingACallDetail: Pātōhia 'Tīmata Waea' i te mata kāinga. Ka taea te tāuru tau haere, mōhiohio tūroro, whakapiri rānei i te kupu tuku.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.swipeGesturesDetail: Mukuhia ki te mauī i ngā rārangi hītori waea hei mukua. Mukuhia ki te matau i ngā kōtaha mō ētahi atu kōwhiringa.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.switchingProfilesDet: Pātōhia tō kōtaha i Tautuhinga hei huri i ngā kōtaha kua tiakina. He pai mō ngā tari rerekē, tūranga rānei.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.syncDetail: Ka noho tukutahi aunoatia te Matau me te iPhone. Ka puta ngā tuhinga mai i te Matau i te iPhone wawetiahia.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.timerColorsDetail: Whakariteritehia te āhua ataata i Tautuhinga. Ka āwhina ngā tae ki te whakaāhua i ngā kāwai rongoā mā te titiro.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.transportTimesDetail: Ka whakaurua e te tuku hōhipera ngā wā kawe: tuku, tae, wehe wāhi, tae ūnga.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.vitalsDetail: Pātōhia Tohu Ora hei whakatuwhera i te puka, kōrerotia rānei ngā uara pēnei i 'BP 120 over 80, pulse 95'.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.voiceLoggingDetail: Hikina tō kakī ka kōrero. Ka tuhi te Matau i ngā rongoā, tohu ora, me ngā tuhipoka kore-ringa.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.voiceTipsDetail: Kōrero māori: 'Narcan 2 milligrams nasal' kōrero rānei 'BP 120 over 80'. Ka mārama MedicLog ki ngā kupu hauora.

strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section1Body:
He rorohiko beta a MedicLog kei raro i te whakawhanake hohe. Ahakoa ka whakamahi mātou i ngā tikanga haumaru pai tae atu ki te whakamuna, ngā whakahaere uru, me ngā whakatūpato PHI, ka whakaratohia tēnei rorohiko mō ngā kaupapa aromatawai.

KA WHAKARATOHIA TĒNEI TAUPĀNGA "PĒ NEI" ME TE KORE WHAKAMANA O TĒTAHI MOmO.

Ka whakamahi mātou i:
• Whakamuna pūrere (iOS Data Protection)
• Whakawhiti whakamuna (AirDrop, ara haumaru)
• Whakatūpato PHI i ngā wāhi kaweake
• Rokiroki ā-rohe anake (kāore he tuku kapua)

Heoi, KO KOE tonu te kawenga mō te hāngai ki HIPAA.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section2Body:
KO KOE (te kaiwhakamahi) te kawenga kotahi mō:
✓ Te whakarite kia hāngai tō whakamahi ki HIPAA me ngā ture e hāngai ana
✓ Te whai i ngā kaupapa here me ngā tikanga o tō tari
✓ Te whakahaere tika i ngā Mōhiohio Hauora Whakamaru (PHI)
✓ Te whakamahi i te haumaru pūrere (waehere, Face ID, whakamuna)
✓ Te tiri raraunga ki ngā kaimahi whaimana anake
✓ Te pupuri i te matatapu tūroro

EHARA te kaihanga i te Business Associate i raro i HIPAA. Kāore mātou e uru, e tuku, e rokiroki rānei i ō raraunga tūroro. Ka noho ngā raraunga katoa i TŌ pūrere.

strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section3Body:
He taputapu tuhinga tēnei taupānga, EHARA i te tohutohu hauora.

Me whai tonu koe i tō whakangungu, tikanga, me te ārahi hauora.

KĀORE te kaihanga E KAWENGA mō:
• Ngā whakatau haumanu i mahia mā tēnei taupānga
• Ngā hapa, takahuri rānei i te tuhinga
• Ngā whakatau tākaro rongoā, maimoatanga rānei
• Ngā hua tūroro, kaupapa kino rānei

• Kāore he tukutahi kapua - kāore te kaihanga e taea te uru ki ō raraunga
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section5Body:
Ina tiri rārangi waea mā AirDrop, īmēra, ētahi atu ara rānei:

KO KOE te kawenga mō:
✓ Te whakaū i te kaiwhiwhi kei te whaimana ki te whiwhi PHI
✓ Te whakamahi i ngā ara tuku haumaru ina wātea
✓ Te whai i te paerewa HIPAA iti rawa e hiahiatia ana
✓ Te tuhi i ngā tuku e ai ki ngā hiahia o tō tari

Ko ngā tuku tari-ki-tari (ahi→waka tūroro) ka whakaurua ngā mōhiohio tūroro. He TIKANGA EMS PAEREWA tēnei, he mea hiahiatia ā-hauora mō te haere tonu o te tiaki. Ka whakarato MedicLog i te haumaru PAI AKE i ngā tuku pepa.

KI TE NUI O TE TURE E WHAKAAETIA ANA, KĀORE TE KAIHANGA E KAWENGA MŌ:

• Takahinga HIPAA, whiu ā-ture rānei

strings.ios.voiceAdvancedSettings.rmsDescription: Te papa rōrahi i raro i tēnei ka kīia ngā anga ororongo he wahangu. Ka mōrearea ake ngā uara iti (nui ake te ororongo ka hopukia). Ka tapahi nui ake ngā uara teitei. Taunoa: 0.010.
strings.ios.voiceAdvancedSettings.sectionDescrip: Tautuhinga matatau ara reo. Ka pā te huri i ēnei uara ki te āhua e whakaāhua ai te Matau i te wahangu i te wā hopu. Whakamahia anake mō te whakatau raruraru ā-wāhi.
strings.ios.voiceAdvancedSettings.title: Tautuhinga Reo Matatau
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.clearAllAlertMessage: Ka tangohia ngā tapanga reo ritenga %lld katoa. Kāore e taea te whakahoki.
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.disableLastAlertMessa: Ka whakaweto tēnei i te tuhi ā-reo mō tēnei rongoā.
Ka whakaweto tēnei i te tuhi ā-reo mō %@. Haere tonu?
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.emptyStateBody: Ka puta ki konei ngā tapanga rongoā tūhuratia. Whakangungu tapanga ritenga hei whakapai i te mōhiotanga.
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.title: Mōhiotanga Reo
strings.ios.voiceAliasTrainer.instructionSubtitl: me te tatari poto i waenga
strings.ios.voiceAliasTrainer.instructionTitle: Kōrero i te kupu 3 ngā wā
strings.ios.voiceAliasTrainer.title: Whakangungu Tapanga Reo
strings.ios.voiceInput.entryLoggedUnparsedToast: Kua tuhia te tuhinga hei kore-wetewete
strings.ios.voiceInput.micPermissionDeniedMessag: Me whai MedicLog i te uru hopuoro hei hopu tuhinga reo. Whakakā i Tautuhinga.
strings.ios.voiceInput.speechPermissionDeniedMes: Kua whakahēngia te uru mōhiotanga reo. Whakakā i Tautuhinga hei whakamahi i te tuhi ā-reo.
strings.ios.voiceInput.speechPermissionRestricte: Kua herea te mōhiotanga reo i tēnei pūrere.
strings.ios.voiceInput.title: Rārangi Reo
strings.ios.voiceInput.transcriptPlaceholder: Ka puta tō kōrero ki konei
strings.ios.voiceMedicationEntry.instructionBody:
Kōrero i ia ingoa rongoā mā te mārama.
Wehea mā ngā piko, "me" rānei.
strings.ios.voiceMedicationEntry.noMedsDetectedB: Ngana kōrero mārama ake, tāpiri rānei ā-ringa i raro
strings.ios.voiceMedicationEntry.title: Tāuru Reo
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.autoPromoteDes: Te kaute whakapono iti rawa e hiahiatia ana i mua i te whakaae aunoatia o te tuhinga rongoā ā-reo me te kore arotake ā-kaimahi. Ka hiahia ngā uara teitei i te tāuru reo katoa ake (ingoa rongoā, tākaro, ara). Taunoa: 0.85.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.autoPromoteWar: Ka pā te huri i tēnei uara ki te whakaae, whakahē aunoatia ohorere rānei o ngā tuhinga reo. Ka hāngai te taunoa (0.85) ki te whanonga paerewa.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.silenceThresho: Te roanga tatari i muri i te mutu kōrero i mua i te whakamutu hopu.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.spokenDetailDe: Poto: ingoa rongoā anake. Katoa: ingoa rongoā, tākaro, me te ara ka kōrerotia i muri i te tuhi.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.stripSilenceDe: Tangohia te wahangu i te tīmatanga me te mutunga o te hopu i mua i te tuku ki te waea. Ka whakaiti i te wā whakawhiti.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.title: Ara Reo
strings.ios.watchConfig.clickEntryDescription: Mahi pātō-tere i te Matau i ngā waea hohe. Ka tuhi ngā tūemi rongoā me tikanga mahi i ngā tuhinga ā-hanganga me te entrySource tika. Muku hei mukua, tō hei whakaraupapa.
strings.ios.watchConfig.connectedDescription: Kua hono te Apple Watch, kua rite
strings.ios.watchConfig.crewAnnounceOffDescripti: Whakakā hei pānui i ngā rongoā me tikanga mahi mā te ture waea mō te mōhio ā-ohu.
strings.ios.watchConfig.crewAnnounceOnDescriptio: Ka pānui te waea i ngā tuhinga rongoā, manawa, me tikanga mahi mā tōna ture mō te mōhio ā-ohu. Kāore e whakaurua ngā tohu ora me ngā tuhipoka. Whakaweto i te taunoa.
strings.ios.watchConfig.disabledDescription: Kua whakawetohia te tukutahi me te whakawhitinga o te Apple Watch. Ka haere tonu te taupānga Matau i te tū motuhake engari kāore e whiwhi tuhinga hou, ataata rānei mai i tēnei waea.
strings.ios.watchConfig.hapticNormalDescription: Tauira orooro paerewa. Ka whakaurua ngā whakatūpato 30-hēkona me ngā tauira ataata-motuhake.
strings.ios.watchConfig.hapticStrongDescription: Orooro kaha ake me ngā roanga poto ake. He pai rawa mō ngā taiao ngangau e hiahia ana i ngā ohorere kaha ake.
strings.ios.watchConfig.hapticSubtleDescription: Orooro māmā ake me ngā roanga roa ake. Kua whakawetohia ngā whakatūpato 30-hēkona. He pai rawa mō ngā ohorere kore-aukati.
strings.ios.watchConfig.loadingVoices: E uta ana ngā reo mai i te Matau…
strings.ios.watchConfig.notConnectedDescription: Kāore te taupānga Apple Watch e mahi ana, kei waho rānei i te awhi
strings.ios.watchConfig.notInstalledMessage: Kāore i kitea a MedicLog i tō Apple Watch. Whakatuwherahia te taupānga Watch i tō iPhone, whakaritea MedicLog hei whakakā i te tukutahi Matau.
strings.ios.watchConfig.notInstalledTitle: Kāore i Whakaritea te Taupānga Matau
strings.ios.watchConfig.notPairedMessage: Honoa he Apple Watch ki tēnei iPhone i te tuatahi, kātahi whakaritea te taupānga MedicLog Matau.
strings.ios.watchConfig.notPairedTitle: Kāore he Apple Watch Kua Honoa
strings.ios.watchConfig.sectionDescription: Whirihia te hononga Apple Watch me te whanonga tāuru reo
strings.ios.watchConfig.sendWhisperMessage: Ka tuku i te tauira tuhinga tuimotu ki tō Apple Watch (~77 MB, ka roa ētahi meneti mā Bluetooth). Kotahi anake te hiahia.
strings.ios.watchConfig.showWatchStatusDescripti: Whakaatu tohu hononga matau i te mata tīmata waea.
strings.ios.watchConfig.speakOnPhoneDescription: Ka kōrero te ture waea i te whakaū tuhinga kua tuhia. Ka noho māngere te Matau.
strings.ios.watchConfig.speakOnWatchDescription: Ka kōrero te Matau i te tuhinga kua tuhia (ingoa rongoā me te ataata) i muri i te whakaū e te waea.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerPageOffDescription: Ka noho kitea ngā whārangi ataata tae noa ki te whakatere ā-ringa.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerPageSecondsDescript: Ka hoki aunoatia ki ngā mowhiti kāinga i muri i te %lld hēkona noho i te whārangi ataata.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerUrgencyDescription: Ina tae te ataata ki tēnei tatau-heke, ka puta aunoatia ki te mua o te Apple Watch.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceListLoadFailed: Kāore i taea te uta rārangi reo mai i te Matau
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceListNotConnected: Kāore te Matau i hono — kāore e wātea te rārangi reo
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceModeAutoDescription: Ka whakarongo aunoatia te Matau mō te tāuru reo ina hiki koe i tō kakī i te wā waea hohe. He pai rawa mō te mahi kore-ringa.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceModeManualDescripti: Pātōhia te pātene LOG hei tīmata i te tāuru reo. He pai rawa mō ngā taiao ngangau kei kōhimuhimu te haruru tuarā.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voicePipelineDescription: Paearu wahangu, tango wahangu, taipitopito kōrero, whakauru-aunoatia
strings.ios.watchConfig.watchVoiceDescription: Kōwhiria ko tēhea reo kua whakaritea ka whakamahia e te Matau ina kōrero i ngā whakaū rongoā.
strings.ios.watchConfig.whisperSuccessMessage: Ka taea e tō Apple Watch te tuhi tuimotu ināianei.

strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.configurable: Whakakā, whakaweto, whakatika rānei ngā tautuhinga Matau i ngā wā katoa i Tautuhinga → Whirihoranga Matau

strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.voice.descri: Kōrero tuhinga mai i tō kakī i ngā waea hohe
